_comment: Recall DynamoDB table definition. Create via console (recommended for Phase 1) or with: aws dynamodb create-table --cli-input-json file://infrastructure/dynamo-schema.json. Only the key attribute (documentId) is declared here — DynamoDB is schemaless for non-key attributes, so filename/status/etc. are written by the Lambda without being predefined. BillingMode PAY_PER_REQUEST (on-demand) keeps you in the free tier with zero idle cost.
